TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hassan_Rouhani, title = Hassan_Rouhani, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hassan_Rouhani} }

S.FORM: == Hassan Rouhani == ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, Hassan Rouhani, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1992) mrhuw Iran ta' misuw hya' ga Hassan Rouhani, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Hassan Rouhani == ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, Hassan Rouhani, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1992) mrhuw Iran ta' misuw hya' ga Hassan Rouhani, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ħas~ɕs~ɕan rouħani == rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ħas~ɕs~ɕan rouħani, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw iran taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ħas~ɕs~ɕan rouħani, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
